definitions: 军阀；割据一方的军事首领

examples.text: In 1467, Japan entered a series of continuous bloody civil wars that would last over a century. But in 1600, Tokugawa Ieyasu defeated his warlord rivals and unified Japan under his rule. This marked the beginning of the Tokugawa shogunate’s reign,
examples.explanation: 这里的 warlord 指“军阀、割据势力的首领”。warlord rivals 表示“其他敌对的军阀”。整句意思是：德川家康击败了其他军阀对手，并在自己的统治下统一了日本。

source.text: How Japan saved its biggest city from collapse - Roman Krznaric
